title: Attack Speed Enchantment
description: Attack Speed is a new enchantment for swords with three levels that increases your attack speed!
body:
# Attack Speed Enchantment

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1327308441324097681?label=discord&color=blue&logo=discord)](https://discord.gg/5UdcDa5xNC)
[![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/attack-speed-enchantment?label=modrinth&logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/attack-speed-enchantment)
[![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/lullaby6/data-packs)](https://github.com/lullaby6/data-packs/blob/main/LICENSE)

Attack Speed is a new enchantment for swords with three levels that increases your attack speed!

The enchantment can be obtained from the enchantment table, loot chests or trading with villagers.

## ⌨️ Commands

Give:

```mcfunction
/loot give @s loot attack_speed_enchantment:<level>
```

Enchant:

```mcfunction
/enchant @s attack_speed_enchantment:attack_speed <level>
```
